thesis_summary: Bearish bias remains actionable only if RTH accepts below prior-day low and VWAP acts as resistance rather than support.

checks.label: Price remains below prior RTH low
checks.rationale: The bearish thesis depends on prior-day demand near 29310 staying broken.

checks.label: Open confirms downside acceptance
checks.rationale: A gap-down open must either drive lower or reject upside quickly; a dip-then-reclaim would warn of liquidation trap.

checks.label: First-hour high stays below reclaim zone
checks.rationale: If 29240 is not reclaimed in the first hour, broken overnight support is acting as supply.

checks.label: Price remains below session VWAP
checks.rationale: Below-VWAP acceptance confirms sellers control value rather than just an opening flush.

checks.label: No reclaim of prior-day low by late morning
checks.rationale: A reclaim above 29310 would neutralize the gap-down breakdown and shift the day toward failed breakdown reclaim.
